breaking.title: US Strikes Hit Bridges, Airport, Railway Station In Iran: Report
breaking.summary: According to Iranian media,  two people had died and four were injured in the attack.

breaking.title: Blasts reported in Iran as US launches new wave of strikes
breaking.summary: Iran says US strikes hit bridges in the country in an apparent escalation, while the US boards a ship in the Strait of Hormuz.

breaking.title: At least one dead in Texas floods ravaging same area where campers died
breaking.summary: The same area devastated by floods last year's floods, which caused more than 130 deaths, is once again being hit.

breaking.title: NEET-UG 2026 results: 11.21 lakh candidates qualify in re-test; women outshine men
breaking.summary: Two candidates, Aryan Gupta from Punjab and Panshul Bansal from Haryana, secured the highest score of 715 (out of 720 marks) in the re-examination; 19 candidates crossed the 700-mark threshold; of the top 138 candidates (scores above 690), 93% cracked the exam on their first attempt, with 99% of them aged between 17 and 19 years

breaking.title: Raise public issues during monsoon session of Parliament, Jagan tells YSRCP MPs
breaking.summary: Governance in Andhra Pradesh has completely collapsed, he alleges

breaking.title: Andhra Pradesh Reports 4 Covid-19 Deaths, 12 Cases In Less Than A Month
breaking.summary: Out of the four deaths, three casualties were from Kadapa district and one from Kakinada.

breaking.title: Avoid deploying Indian sailors on vessels moving via Strait of Hormuz: DGMA to shipping companies
breaking.summary: The advisory came after the attacks this week on two vessels, in which 30 Indian seafarers were among a combined crew of 46

breaking.title: Ukrainians protest Zelenskyy's ouster of his popular defense minister
breaking.summary: President Zelenskyy reshuffled his wartime government, impacting key defense and prime ministerial roles. The defense minister's ouster sparked protests, highlighting friction with the military establishment. Ukraine's new prime minister, Serhii Koretskyi, leads the state energy company Naftogaz. These changes occur as Ukraine's fight against Russia continues with ongoing aerial attacks. The personnel overhaul tests Zelenskyy's political authority during the ongoing conflict.
